polygon.title: terrain-mountain-north (mountain) Northern Mountains — east-west barrier vs Altonia. Two passes embedded (Lowenskyst NE, Spartfell NW).
terrain-highland-hafenmark (highland) Hafenmark Highlands — Swiss-coded. Rocky, mineral deposits, limited arable. Includes T8, T10.
terrain-highland-halvarshelm (highland) Halvarshelm mining highland (T17). Iron and copper deposits.
terrain-highland-grauwald (highland) Grauwald highland timber (T4). NE shore of Lake Eidursjø. Einhir heritage.
terrain-highland-himmelenger (highland) Mountain ridge — Cathedral seat (T9). Containment placement between passes.
terrain-forest-rendstad (forest) Rendstad Timber Valley (T7). Hafenmark forest. Remote, slow movement.
terrain-plains-kronmark (plains) Kronmark agricultural heartland (T2). Crown breadbasket administration.
terrain-plains-valorsplatz (plains) Valorsplatz lowlands (T1). River-sea nexus.
terrain-plains-feldmark (plains) Feldmark breadbasket (T5). Largest grain production. Hafenmark food anchor.
terrain-plains-ehrenfeld (plains) Ehrenfeld central plain (T14). Military hinge.
terrain-fjord-halvardshelm (fjord_coast) Western fjord coast — T11 Halvardshelm. Norwegian-coded. Limited ports.
terrain-fjord-sigurdshelm (fjord_coast) Western fjord coast — T12 Sigurdshelm. Vaynard's seat coast. Sigurdshelm Cove (S-027).
terrain-fjord-oastad (fjord_coast) Southern fjord coast — T13 Oastad. Calamity-adjacent. RM stronghold.
terrain-coast-east (coast) Eastern Lowlands coast. Italian-coded. River-Valoris outflow at Valorsplatz.
terrain-coast-schoenland (coast) Schoenland island coast (T16). Independent republic.
terrain-marsh-stillhelm (marsh) Stillhelm southern marsh (T6). Calamity bleed.
terrain-marsh-askeheim (marsh) Askeheim marsh (T15). Calamity epicenter. Forgetting overlay applies.
terrain-marsh-lake-shore (marsh) Lake Eidursjø shoreline marsh band — encompasses lake itself. Major east-west barrier.
terrain-pass-lowenskyst (mountain_pass) Lowenskyst NE pass — primary Altonian crossing. T3 gates this pass. S-006 Fortress.
terrain-pass-spartfell (mountain_pass) Spartfell NW pass — secondary Altonian crossing. T10 gates this pass. S-019 Fortress.
T1 Valorsplatz (Crown) Crown capital. River-sea nexus, eastern coast at Valoris river outflow.
T2 Kronmark (Crown) Crown heartland between capital and northern pass. Italian-coded farmland.
T3 Lowenskyst (Crown) NE Altonian pass. Primary chokepoint. Fort Level 3 (max 4).
T4 Grauwald (Varfell) NE shore of Lake Eidursjø. Highland timber, Einhir heritage.
T5 Feldmark (Crown) Crown breadbasket. Hafenmark food dependency anchor.
T6 Stillhelm (Crown) Calamity-adjacent. Southern Crown gate to Askeheim (Gate 2).
T7 Rendstad (Hafenmark) Hafenmark timber valley. Forested. Remote.
T8 Gransol (Hafenmark) Hafenmark constitutional capital. West sea trade. Schoenland route.
T9 Himmelenger (Church) Church seat. Cathedral on the mountain ridge between passes. Altonian containment-placement.
T10 Spartfell (Hafenmark) NW Altonian pass. Secondary chokepoint. Fort Level 2.
T11 Halvardshelm (Varfell) Varfell central fjords. North-of-lake. Spartfell border contact.
T12 Sigurdshelm (Varfell) Varfell seat. West shore of Lake Eidursjø. Vaynard's court.
T13 Oastad (Varfell) Varfell southern gate to Askeheim (Gate 1). Calamity-adjacent.
T14 Ehrenfeld (Crown) Crown military hinge. Löwenritter base. 5-way connection. Fort Level 3.
T15 Askeheim (Uncontrolled) Calamity epicenter. Forgetting zone. Two gates: Oastad (T13) and Stillhelm (T6).
T16 Schoenland (Schoenland) Independent island republic. Altonian trade. Naval choke control.
T17 Halvarshelm (Hafenmark) Northern mines. Iron and copper. Guild operations.

g.title: S-001 Valorsplatz Palace (Seat, Crown) Royal court. Lion's Table HQ. Torben resides here.
S-002 Valorsplatz Riverside (Port, Crown) River trade hub. Guild quarter. Largest market in Valoria.
S-003 Valorsplatz Cathedral (Cathedral, Church) Old Solmundic church. Politically significant — Church presence in capital.
S-004 Kronmark (Town, Crown) Agricultural heartland center. Crown's breadbasket administration.
S-005 Kronmark Watchtower (Fortress, Crown) Guards northern approach to Valorsplatz.
S-006 Lowenskyst Fortress (Fortress, Crown) NE pass fortress. Primary Altonian chokepoint. Fort Level 3 (max 4).
S-007 Lowenskyst Garrison Town (Town, Crown) Military support settlement. Soldiers' families, supply depot.
S-008 Feldmark (Town, Crown) Breadbasket territory. Granary complex. Hafenmark food dependency anchor.
S-009 Feldmark Storehouse (Mine, Crown) Strategic food storage and processing. Controls food supply to northern provinces.
S-010 Stillhelm (Town, Crown) Southern farming settlement. Calamity-adjacent. Population uneasy.
S-011 Stillhelm Watch (Outpost, Crown) Observation post facing Askeheim. Calamity monitoring. Warden contact point.
S-012 Ehrenfeld Citadel (Fortress, Crown) Military headquarters. Löwenritter base. 5-way connection hub. Fort Level 3.
S-013 Ehrenfeld Market (City, Crown) Trade junction at the crossroads. Merchants from all factions.
S-014 Ehrenfeld Barracks (Fortress, Löwenritter) Riskbreaker operations. Separate from Citadel command.
S-015 Gransol Parliament (Seat, Hafenmark) Parliament building. Baralta's court. Constitutional center.
S-016 Gransol Harbor (Port, Hafenmark) Western sea trade. Schoenland route.
S-017 Gransol Market Quarter (City, Guilds) Guild headquarters. Largest trade settlement in Hafenmark.
S-018 Rendstad (Town, Hafenmark) Timber processing. Remote valley settlement.
S-019 Spartfell Fortress (Fortress, Hafenmark) NW pass fortress. Secondary Altonian chokepoint. Fort Level 2.
S-020 Spartfell Village (Town, Hafenmark) Border garrison town.
S-021 Halvarshelm Mines (Mine, Hafenmark) Primary mining operation. Iron and copper.
S-022 Halvarshelm Town (Town, Hafenmark) Miner settlement. Guild labor presence.
S-023 Himmelenger Cathedral (Cathedral, Church) Solmundic spiritual center. Confessor's seat. Highest Piety.
S-024 Himmelenger City (City, Church) Urban population. Scholars. Cardinal of Temperance.
S-025 Himmelenger Seminary (Cathedral, Church) Church training. Theological center. Inquisitor recruitment.
S-026 Sigurdshelm Keep (Seat, Varfell) Vaynard's court. Private Collection housed here.
S-027 Sigurdshelm Cove (Port, Varfell) Fjord access. Varfell's limited naval capability.
S-028 Grauwald (Town, Varfell) Highland settlement. Einhir heritage site. RM presence.
S-029 Grauwald Lodge (Outpost, RM) Einhir cultural preservation. RM meeting site. Hidden.
S-030 Halvardshelm (Town, Varfell) Central fjord settlement.
S-031 Oastad (Town, Varfell) Southern fishing settlement. Calamity-adjacent.
S-032 Oastad Shrine (Outpost, RM) Old Einhir ceremonial site. RM stronghold. Lowest CV territory. Community Organizing site.
S-033 Askeheim Ruins (Outpost, Wardens) Einhir Catastrophe epicenter. Active Warden operations. Forgetting barrier.
S-034 Askeheim Gate (Outpost, Uncontrolled) Southern access point. Observation camp. No permanent population.
S-035 Schoenland City (City, Schoenland) Island capital. Altonian trade. Independent governance.
S-036 Schoenland Harbor (Port, Schoenland) Naval base. Passage control. Altonian supply chain.

svg.text: Coordinate system: top-left origin, +x east, +y south
